title: hieracium cordifolium subsp. protocerinthe
intro: Hieracium cordifolium subsp. protocerinthe, also known as a subspecies of the Heartleaf Hawk's-beard, is a flowering plant within the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, and is used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium cordifolium subsp. protocerinthe include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as supporting the immune system and aiding in the detoxification of the body. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
